userProfile.title: Profile
userProfile.description: Update your name and email address.
userProfile.lockedBanner: Your profile is managed by {{provider}} and cannot be edited here.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language for the Praetor interface.
language.autoDesc: Automatically detect language from your browser settings

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose the theme for the Praetor interface.

light.name: Light
light.description: Uses light mode for the app interface.

dark.name: Dark
dark.description: Uses dark mode for the app interface.

zebra.name: Zebra
zebra.description: Use light mode with a dark sidebar.

praetor.name: Praetor
praetor.description: Use light mode with a Praetor-colored dark sidebar.

auto.name: Auto
auto.description: Match your browser or operating system color scheme automatically.

password.title: Password Settings
password.description: Update the password for your Praetor account.
password.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters long
password.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from the current password
password.lockedBanner: Your password is managed by {{provider}}. Change it there.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Create tokens that let AI agents access Praetor over the MCP protocol.
mcp.urlDescription: Use this Streamable HTTP endpoint when adding Praetor to an external MCP client.
mcp.promptDescription: Create a token, then paste this prompt into an AI agent to configure Praetor automatically.
mcp.namePlaceholder: Claude Desktop, Codex, or another agent
mcp.scopeFullDescription: Token inherits every permission of your current role, including write tools.
mcp.scopeReadOnlyDescription: Token can only call read-only (view) tools, even if your role has write permissions.
mcp.revokeDialogDescription: This immediately disables {{name}}. Agents using this token will lose access to Praetor.
mcp.rawTokenDescription: Praetor stores only a hash and cannot show this token again.

security.title: Security
security.tokenLoadFailed: Failed to load personal access token
security.tokenRenewFailed: Failed to renew personal access token

personalAccessToken.title: Personal Access Token
personalAccessToken.description: Use this token with the API to act as your user account and inherit your current permissions.
personalAccessToken.visibleOnce: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again after you leave this page.
personalAccessToken.masked: The full token is hidden. Renew it to generate and copy a new one.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second step to your sign-in using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.idpManagedDescription: Two-factor authentication is managed by your identity provider.
twoFactor.disabledByAdminDescription: Two-factor authentication is currently turned off for your organization. It cannot be set up until an administrator enables it.
twoFactor.requiredByOrg: Two-factor authentication is required for your role. You can regenerate backup codes, but it cannot be turned off.
twoFactor.requiredByOrgSetup: Two-factor authentication is required for your role. Set it up now — you will be asked to complete it at your next sign-in otherwise.
twoFactor.scanInstructions: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to verify.
twoFactor.reauthDescription: For your security, re-enter your account password to start setting up two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.manualKeyLabel: Can't scan? Enter this key manually
twoFactor.backupInstructions: Store these backup codes somewhere safe. Each code can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator. They are shown only once.
twoFactor.disableDescription: Confirm your identity to turn off two-factor authentication.

ril.title: RIL
ril.description: Choose a default Trasferta (location) to pre-fill for each weekday on your RIL sheet.
ril.weekdayDefaultsHint: These pre-fill the Trasferta column when a RIL sheet is generated. You can still change any day before exporting.

general.title: General Settings
general.localizationDisplayDescription: Locale and currency defaults applied across reports and the user interface.
general.aiCapabilitiesDescription: Connect an AI provider so users can generate insights from data they can access.

documentCodes.title: Document Codes
documentCodes.description: Configure the prefixes, templates, and yearly counters used for new commercial and accounting documents.
documentCodes.loadFailed: Failed to load document code templates
documentCodes.saveFailed: Failed to save document code templates
documentCodes.placeholdersDescription: Use {PREFIX}, {YY}, {YYYY}, and {SEQ}. Include {SEQ} and either {YY} or {YYYY}; the sequence is zero-padded and resets for each module at the start of every year.
documentCodes.manualOverride: Users can still enter a manual document code. Leaving the code blank on new documents uses the template.

errors.prefixPattern: Use letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens
errors.templateTextPattern: Template text can only use letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

general.currencyDescription: This currency symbol will be used globally in reports and user management.
general.globalTrackingPreferencesDescription: Defaults that govern how time is tracked for every user.
general.dailyLimitDescription: Threshold for visual highlights in the tracker.
general.startOfWeekDescription: Default start day for calendar and reports.
general.treatSaturdayAsHolidayDescription: Disables Saturday selection in the calendar for all users.
general.allowWeekendSelectionDescription: Enables Saturday and Sunday for time entry in both daily and weekly views.
general.enableAiReportingLabel: Enable AI Reporting for all users
general.enableAiReportingDescription: When enabled, users can chat with AI Reporting to generate insights from business data they have access to.
general.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Google Gemini API Key
general.apiKeyRequired: API Key is required when any AI feature is enabled
general.apiKeyDescription: Required for AI features. Your key is stored securely. Get one at
general.openrouterApiKeyDescription: Required for AI features. Your key is stored securely. Get one at
general.anthropicApiKeyDescription: Required for AI features. Your key is stored securely. Get one at
general.openaiApiKeyDescription: Required for AI features. Your key is stored securely. Get one at
general.aiProviderDescription: Select which provider to use for AI features.
general.modelIdRequired: Model ID is required when any AI feature is enabled
general.modelNotFound: Model not found for this provider/key
general.modelCheckError: Unable to verify model right now
general.modelIdDescription: Use the exact model id from the provider.
general.defaultLocationDescription: Default location for new time entries. Users can override per entry.
general.rilSettingsDescription: Defaults used by the monthly RIL attendance export.
general.rilCompanyNameDescription: Printed in the RIL workbook header.
general.rilDefaultStartTimeDescription: Default entrance for valid RIL days.
general.rilDefaultExitTimeDescription: Default exit for valid RIL days.

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Customize the company name and logo shown in the sidebar and on the login screen.
branding.companyNameDescription: Replaces the "PRAETOR" name in the sidebar. Leave empty to use the default.
branding.logoDescription: Shown in the sidebar and on the login screen. Leave empty to use the default Praetor logo.
branding.uploadHint: PNG, JPEG, WEBP or SVG, up to 2 MB.
branding.invalidType: Unsupported image. Use PNG, JPEG, WEBP or SVG.
branding.tooLarge: Image is too large. Maximum size is 2 MB.

email.title: Email Settings
email.subtitle: Configure SMTP settings for email notifications
email.smtpServerDescription: Connect Praetor to your outbound SMTP relay to deliver notification emails.
email.passwordStoredHelp: Leave as-is to keep the stored password, or click Replace to overwrite it.
email.testDescription: Send a test email to verify your SMTP configuration is working correctly.
email.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the test email.

errors.mustBeEnabled: Email must be enabled to send test
